paragraphs: I am an aspiring IT Project Manager passionate about transforming complex ideas into well-structured, achievable projects. My interest lies in project coordination, Agile practices, and creating systems that help teams work efficiently toward a common goal.

Rather than focusing solely on software development, I enjoy planning, organizing, tracking progress, identifying risks, and improving collaboration between people. I believe successful projects are built through clear communication, structured execution, and continuous improvement.

To strengthen these skills, I have completed professional project management and Agile training, gained hands-on experience with Jira, and am building practical knowledge through real project simulations and collaborative software projects. My long-term goal is to grow into a Project Manager who leads technology projects with clarity, accountability, and a systems-thinking approach.

quickFacts.interests: Agile Methodologies, Project Lifecycle Management, Scrum Framework, Jira & Agile, Project Tracking, Systems Thinking, Consumer Technology, Team Coordination
